{{Infobox artifact
| name = Emperor's crown (Cradle)
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Emperor]]'s crown refers to a collection of thirty-two artifacts located on a tropical [[island]]. These crowns are easily identifiable from the air because they emit a golden beacon of light, though the physical objects remain hidden beneath thick forest canopies. When an individual places a crown on their head, the golden light intensifies and turns white. This action is permanent; once worn, a crown can only be removed if the wearer is killed. These white crowns are associated with the [[Silent King]].}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|A crown is only removed if the wearer is killed while wearing it.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|There are supposed to be twenty-eight more crowns.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Crowns appear at a rate of ten per hour.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Crowns appear during the tournament rounds.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Kerani]] saw a glimmer of white light resembling a crown behind [[Terkell]]'s head.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|"But there are supposed to be twenty-eight more crowns."<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
